HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Debt Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Anil Bamboli is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,44,244 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 22 Jul 2026 is ₹35.23. The HDFC Short Term Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated Moderate risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100.

HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund Direct Growth HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Dhruv Muchhal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,44,244 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 22 Jul 2026 is ₹23.42. The HDFC Housing Opportunities Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.
